message:
test(fuzz): EnforcementCheckOrder canonical pipeline (gh1i4)

Add fuzz_enforcement_check_order covering the NORMATIVE enforcement
pipeline ordering (enforcement.rs:34-175). Properties: length+COUNT,
determinism, index_of ↔ canonical_order position bijection, runs_before
matches index comparison, irreflexive + antisymmetric + transitive
partial order, as_str distinctness, Display/as_str agreement.
CheckOutcome predicates verified (Allow/Deny/Skip mutual exclusion).
Once-gated anchors lock down the cheap-before-expensive NORMATIVE
ordering: CanonicalDecode → CapabilityVerify → HolderProof; structural
ZoneMembership before crypto; CheckpointFreshness before
RevocationFreshness; cryptographic before stateful Budget; Budget
before RateLimit. Anchors also lock the exact array index of each of
the 11 variants byte-for-byte.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1204,5 +1204,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_enforcement_check_order"
+path = "fuzz_targets/enforcement_check_order.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
